history.en: Ancient landrace breed native to the Armenian Highlands, used for millennia as livestock and home guardian protecting against predators and intruders, developed through natural selection rather than selective breeding for appearance
history.zh: 原产于亚美尼亚高地的古老地方品种，数千年来被用作抵御捕食者和入侵者的家畜和家园护卫犬，通过自然选择而非外观选择性繁育发展而来。

overview.en: The Armenian Gampr is a powerful, ancient landrace breed from the Armenian Highlands, developed over millennia through natural selection as a livestock and home guardian. This dog is highly protective, independent, and deeply loyal to its family, yet calm and intelligent in temperament. Unlike breeds refined for appearance, the Gampr retains a rugged, self-reliant nature with strong instincts to defend against predators and intruders. They are not overly affectionate with strangers but form profound bonds with their owners. Their independence can be mistaken for aloofness, but they are thoughtful and observant. Gamprs are typically quiet, barking only when necessary, and possess a steady, confident demeanor. As working dogs, they require purpose and mental stimulation to thrive. Their size and strength demand respect, but they are gentle with those they trust. This breed is best suited for experienced owners who understand its guarding heritage and need for consistent leadership.
overview.zh: 亚美尼亚加姆普犬是一种源自亚美尼亚高地的古老原生犬种，经过数千年的自然选择，发展为牲畜和家园的守护者。这种犬非常具有保护性、独立性，对家庭极度忠诚，同时性情冷静且聪明。与注重外观的犬种不同，加姆普犬保留着坚韧、自主的特质，具有强烈的抵御捕食者和入侵者的本能。它们对陌生人不会过分热情，但与主人建立深厚的情感纽带。独立性可能被误认为冷漠，但实际上它们善于思考且观察力强。加姆普犬通常安静，仅在必要时吠叫，拥有沉稳自信的气质。作为工作犬，它们需要目标和精神刺激才能茁壮成长。体型和力量要求尊重，但对信任的人十分温柔。该品种最适合有经验的主人，理解其守护本能并需要一致性的领导。

care.en: Daily care for the Armenian Gampr is relatively low-maintenance due to its thick double coat, which sheds seasonally. Brush two to three times per week to remove dead hair and reduce shedding; increase to daily during heavy shedding periods. Bathe only when necessary to preserve natural skin oils. Exercise is crucial: provide at least 60 to 90 minutes of vigorous activity daily, including long walks, hiking, or secure off-leash running in a fenced area. Gamprs are not hyperactive but need space to patrol and explore. Regular veterinary check-ups are essential to monitor for hip dysplasia, bloat, and other large-breed concerns. Keep vaccinations and parasite prevention up to date. Nail trimming every few weeks, ear cleaning, and dental hygiene should be part of the routine. This breed adapts to cold climates but needs shade and water in heat. Always supervise around small children due to size, and ensure a secure yard to prevent roaming.
care.zh: 亚美尼亚加姆普犬的日常护理相对简单，其双层厚毛在换季时会大量脱落。每周梳理两到三次以去除死毛并减少掉毛，换毛高峰期需每日梳理。仅在必要时洗澡，以保留天然油脂。运动至关重要：每天至少需要60到90分钟的高强度活动，包括长时间散步、远足或在围栏区域内安全地自由奔跑。加姆普犬并非过度活跃，但需要空间巡逻和探索。定期兽医检查必不可少，以监测髋关节发育不良、胃扭转等大型犬常见健康问题。保持疫苗接种和驱虫及时。每几周修剪指甲、清洁耳朵和牙齿护理应成为常规。该品种适应寒冷气候，但炎热时需提供阴凉和饮水。由于其体型，始终需监督与幼儿的互动，并确保院子安全以防走失。

training.en: Training an Armenian Gampr requires patience, consistency, and respect for its independent nature. This breed is highly intelligent but not eager to please in the traditional sense; it thinks independently and may question commands. Use positive reinforcement methods such as treats, praise, and play, but avoid harsh corrections which can damage trust. Early socialization is critical—expose the puppy to various people, animals, environments, and sounds to prevent overprotectiveness or fearfulness. Focus on basic obedience and impulse control from an early age. Because Gamprs were bred to make decisions independently, they respond best to training that acknowledges their intelligence and gives them a job. Short, varied sessions (10-15 minutes) work better than long repetitive drills. Leash training is essential given their strength. Establish clear leadership without dominance-based techniques. Once a Gampr respects you, it will be a reliable and devoted partner. Professional training classes are recommended for first-time owners.
training.zh: 训练亚美尼亚加姆普犬需要耐心、一致性，并尊重其独立性格。该品种非常聪明，但并非传统意义上渴望取悦；它们独立思考，可能质疑指令。使用正面强化方法，如零食、赞美和游戏，避免严厉纠正，以免破坏信任。早期社会化至关重要——让幼犬接触各种人、动物、环境和声音，以防止过度保护或胆怯。从小注重基础服从和冲动控制。由于加姆普犬天生需要自主决策，它们对认可其智力并赋予任务的训练反应最佳。短而多样的训练环节（10-15分钟）比长时间重复练习更有效。鉴于其力量，牵引绳训练必不可少。建立清晰的领导地位，避免使用支配性技巧。一旦加姆普犬尊重你，它将成为可靠且忠诚的伙伴。对于初次饲养者，建议参加专业训练课程。

diet.en: The Armenian Gampr thrives on a high-quality diet appropriate for a large, active working breed. Feed a balanced commercial or raw diet rich in animal protein (chicken, beef, lamb, fish) and healthy fats to support muscle maintenance and energy. Adult Gamprs typically require 4 to 6 cups of dry food per day, divided into two meals, but adjust based on activity level, age, and metabolism. Avoid overfeeding to prevent obesity and joint stress. Puppies should be fed three to four smaller meals daily to support growth without bloat risk. Include glucosamine and chondroitin supplements for joint health, especially as the dog ages. Fresh, clean water must always be available. Avoid foods high in grains, fillers, or artificial additives. Raw diets should be formulated under veterinary guidance to ensure nutritional completeness. Monitor weight and body condition regularly. Because Gamprs are prone to bloat, avoid vigorous exercise immediately after meals and consider using slow-feeder bowls.
diet.zh: 亚美尼亚加姆普犬适合高质量、适合大型活跃工作犬的饮食。喂食均衡的商业犬粮或生食，富含动物蛋白（鸡肉、牛肉、羊肉、鱼肉）和健康脂肪，以支持肌肉维持和能量。成年加姆普犬通常每天需要4到6杯干粮，分两餐喂食，但需根据活动量、年龄和新陈代谢调整。避免过度喂食以防止肥胖和关节压力。幼犬应每日分三到四小餐，以支持生长并降低胃扭转风险。添加葡萄糖胺和软骨素补充剂以维护关节健康，尤其随着年龄增长。始终提供新鲜干净的水。避免含大量谷物、填充剂或人工添加剂的食物。生食应在兽医指导下配制以确保营养全面。定期监测体重和身体状况。由于加姆普犬易患胃扭转，餐后避免剧烈运动，并考虑使用慢食碗。

livingTips.en: The Armenian Gampr is best suited to a home with a large, securely fenced yard where it can patrol and exercise. Apartment living is generally not recommended due to its size, protective nature, and need for space. This breed thrives in rural or suburban settings with room to roam. It is calm indoors but requires daily outdoor activity. Gamprs are generally good with children they are raised with, but due to their size and guarding instincts, supervision is always necessary, especially with toddlers. They can coexist with other pets if socialized early, but may be dominant with same-sex dogs and may view small animals as prey. Strangers should be introduced carefully, as Gamprs are naturally wary. They are excellent watchdogs and will alert to any unusual activity. Provide a comfortable, sheltered sleeping area outdoors or indoors. Mental stimulation through puzzle toys, scent games, or guarding tasks is important to prevent boredom. This breed is not for novice owners; it requires an experienced handler who can provide firm, fair leadership.
livingTips.zh: 亚美尼亚加姆普犬最适合拥有大型、安全围栏院子的家庭，以便巡逻和运动。一般不建议公寓生活，因其体型、保护本能和空间需求。该品种在农村或郊区环境中最能茁壮成长，需有活动空间。它们在室内平静，但每天需要户外活动。加姆普犬通常对一起长大的孩子友善，但由于体型和守护本能，始终需要监督，尤其与幼儿相处时。如果早期社会化，它们能与其他宠物共存，但可能对同性犬具有支配性，并视小动物为猎物。陌生人应谨慎引入，因为加姆普犬天生警惕。它们是出色的看门犬，会对任何异常活动发出警报。提供舒适、有遮蔽的睡眠区域，室内外均可。通过益智玩具、气味游戏或守护任务进行精神刺激，以防无聊。该品种不适合新手主人；需要经验丰富的饲养者提供坚定而公平的领导。
